features.label: Authentic Pronunciation
features.description: Sandhi and Samskritam rules based lead and follow audio available for easy learning. Rewind, fast-forward, increase or decrease the speed to match your style and convenience.

features.label: True Spiritual Meaning
features.description: Sourced from Gurus from across centuries. Discourses from Swamis like Paramarthananda, Chinmayananda, and even Adi Shankaracharya have been incorporated.

features.label: Kid-Friendly Stories
features.description: Every Shloka has stories relevant to the Shloka to make the meaning easy to understand. Stories are authentically sourced from Mahabharata, Ramayana, Panchatantra and Puranas. Stories of Sages, Rishis, and Gurus from the history of Bharatam are included to make it both relatable and inspiring.

features.label: Reflection Questions
features.description: "Why should this Shloka matter to me?", "What is the relevance of this lesson in today's life?" are answered through practical everyday reflection questions. Ask yourself, contemplate and let the spirituality flower.

features.label: Samskritam Grammar
features.description: Padacchedaḥ, Prati-padārthaḥ, Padaparicayaḥ, Anvayaḥ, Sandhi, Samāsa and many more grammatical aspects included for the serious samskritam learner.

features.label: Straight from Gurus
features.description: The meanings are not made up. They are not sourced randomly from the internet. These are words of Gurus from across history who have walked this earth. Rest assured of the authenticity of the lessons.
